perspectives.description: The DECIDER is a representative from the company who has the authority to promote the company's benefits and influence the job candidate's decision.
The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is the job candidate who is considering offers from both the company and its competitor, and their career path will be significantly impacted by the decision made.
The THIRD_PARTY is a current employee of the company who may be affected by the hiring decision, as it could influence team dynamics and workload if the candidate joins.
